text_raw: If nothing's done, the village will...
text_clean: If nothing's done, the village will...

text_raw: Solumen save us...
text_clean: Solumen save us...

text_raw: Have you seen any men wearing strange masks?
text_clean: Have you seen any men wearing strange masks?

text_raw: Because of them, we've lost our homes... driven all the way out here.
text_clean: Because of them, we've lost our homes... driven all the way out here.

text_raw: Yes... they appeared out of nowhere, took everything we had...
text_clean: Yes... they appeared out of nowhere, took everything we had...

text_raw: ...then declared they'd use our village as a foothold, and drove us all out.
text_clean: ...then declared they'd use our village as a foothold, and drove us all out.

text_raw: They've no intention of living here peacefully.
text_clean: They've no intention of living here peacefully.

text_raw: I've seen them hauling weapons into the village several times a day.
text_clean: I've seen them hauling weapons into the village several times a day.

text_raw: Mostly explosives.
text_clean: Mostly explosives.

text_raw: Aye. They're dangerous, no doubt about it.
text_clean: Aye. They're dangerous, no doubt about it.

text_raw: I don't care about getting my belongings back. Just stop them, I beg you.
text_clean: I don't care about getting my belongings back. Just stop them, I beg you.

text_raw: Sounds like bandits.
text_clean: Sounds like bandits.

text_raw: Explosives?
text_clean: Explosives?

text_raw: We can all return home thanks to you.
text_clean: We can all return home thanks to you.

text_raw: This...
text_clean: This...

text_raw: This is a keepsake from my father.
text_clean: This is a keepsake from my father.

text_raw: I never thought I'd see it again... Thank you so much.
text_clean: I never thought I'd see it again... Thank you so much.

text_raw: Not really.
text_clean: Not really.

text_raw: But I know they serve as a means to cast off their past.
text_clean: But I know they serve as a means to cast off their past.

text_raw: They hide their names, their faces, even the lives they've lived, behind those masks...
text_clean: They hide their names, their faces, even the lives they've lived, behind those masks...

text_raw: and live without knowing who anyone else really is.
text_clean: and live without knowing who anyone else really is.

text_raw: I found this among their things...
text_clean: I found this among their things...

text_raw: Do you know anything about their masks?
text_clean: Do you know anything about their masks?

text_raw: Coveting what is not yours...
text_clean: Coveting what is not yours...

text_raw: Come. I'll teach you your place.
text_clean: Come. I'll teach you your place.

text_raw: No! I can still fight!
text_clean: No! I can still fight!

text_raw: This isn't over yet!
text_clean: This isn't over yet!

text_raw: I haven't lost!
text_clean: I haven't lost!

text_raw: This village is ours! Taken fair and square!
text_clean: This village is ours! Taken fair and square!

text_raw: No one can stand in our way!
text_clean: No one can stand in our way!

text_raw: This has nothing to do with you, outsider!
text_clean: This has nothing to do with you, outsider!

text_raw: You know nothing about us!
text_clean: You know nothing about us!

text_raw: If you take issue, come reclaim it by force!
text_clean: If you take issue, come reclaim it by force!

text_raw: That's the law of the desert!
text_clean: That's the law of the desert!

text_raw: Think you can run forever?
text_clean: Think you can run forever?
